concerns.description: Minor text differences beyond acceptable reformatting
concerns.analysis: There is a textual omission in the contact information section at the end of the document on page 2. The email address 'Bob.Coats@osbm.nc.gov' is present in the source PDF between the department name and the phone number, but it is absent from the JSON output. This omission constitutes a difference in the information provided compared to the source.

In Section 2 (Page 2), the document title 'Preparing for the Census – We Have Work To Do!' is correctly identified as Heading Level 1 (element 19). However, the next heading in the structure, 'Bob Coats' (element 26), is assigned Heading Level 3. There is no Heading Level 2 present in Section 2 to bridge this gap, resulting in a skipped heading level which hinders screen reader navigation.
